title: goal_verify pass transition H3 pending
purpose: A2.5 defines goal verify pass transition h3 pending for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified.
scope: Owns `A2.5` only; siblings under `A2` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §3 — Branch A — Pursuit & control plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#3-branch-a-pursuit-control-plane).
behavior_steps: When [A2.4](A2.4-goal-scope-complete-run-goal-verify.md) reports goal_verify success, the conductor sets goal.state to verifying and adds H3 sign-off to gates_pending per [INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)—autonomous pursuit stops before declaring achieved.
Journal-keeper dual-writes hitl.h3_pending, verification evidence paths, and last_verify passed to journal/progress.md and state.json in the same update so resume after crash still shows awaiting H3.

[A6.1](A6.1-notify-dashboard-status-webhook-phase-complete.md) surfaces the verified outcome to the operator via dashboard or webhook digest without requiring another implement turn—non-blocking unless strict HITL mode demands a hard wait.

At H3 the operator accepts (goal.state → achieved) or rejects with structured notes, returning pursuit to pursuing and clearing achieved until [A2.1](A2.1-preflight-check-pipeline-blocked-extended.md) preflight reconciles scope and evidence.

If goal_verify passes but H3 pending dual-write fails, or gates_pending omits H3 while notification fires, pursuit fails closed at H2 until journal and state.json reconcile—premature achieved is forbidden.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
goal_verify passes but H3 rejected â€” goal.state returns to pursuing with rejection notes.
Edge case `A2.5` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `A2.5`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Add `goal` block to state template and journal-keeper dual-write (v2.14).
Implement `scripts/goal-verify.py` stub aggregating task evidence paths.
Document `A2.5` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `A2.5`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: A2.5 defines goal verify pass transition h3 pending for the agent-driven expert system. Pursuit & control plane — autonomous loops until goal verified. In practice, the system when [a2.4](a2.4-goal-scope-complete-run-goal-verify.md) reports goal_verify success, the conductor sets goal.state to verifying and adds h3 sign-off to gates_pending per [intro-1.2](intro-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)—autonomous pursuit stops before declaring achieved, then journal-keeper dual-writes hitl.h3_pending, verification evidence paths, and last_verify passed to journal/progress.md and state.json in the same update so resume after crash still shows awaiting h3.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent pilot 2026-06-28 -->

Passing goal_verify is necessary but not sufficient for closure. This capability defines transition to H3 pending: verification succeeded, human final sign-off is required, and the goal state reflects verifying → awaiting H3.

The system notifies the operator; it does not block the world indefinitely unless strict HITL mode demands it. H3 is the third human touchpoint—accept or reject verified outcomes. Rejection returns the goal to pursuing with structured notes.

Automating everything except H3 is the INTRO contract; this step enforces that boundary in the pursuit loop.
